signals.headline: King Charles to Meet Trump; Trump Predicts Iran War End Soon | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
King Charles to Meet Trump; Trump Predicts Iran War End Soon | YES | HIGH confidence**  
King Charles is scheduled for a private meeting and tea with US President Donald Trump to restore UK-US ties, announced in live Middle East conflict updates on April 15, 2026[1]. signals.headline: Iran Slams US Hormuz Blockade as Ceasefire Breach Risk, Reaffirms Nuclear Rights | NO (on de-escalation) | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
Iran Slams US Hormuz Blockade as Ceasefire Breach Risk, Reaffirms Nuclear Rights | NO (on de-escalation) | HIGH confidence**  
Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei criticized the US blockade as risking ceasefire violations while insisting uranium enrichment is non-negotiable (though some aspects may be); this follows failed talks in Pakistan.[1][2]

signals.headline: Russia Labels US-Israel Actions Against Iran 'Unprovoked Aggression' | NO (on reduced tensions) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia Labels US-Israel Actions Against Iran 'Unprovoked Aggression' | NO (on reduced tensions) | HIGH confidence**  
Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov condemned US and Israeli moves on Iran as unprovoked, casting doubt on Trump's policies and highlighting Russia's financial gains from the conflict.[4][2]

signals.headline: Trump Issues Urgent National Warning, Places US on High Alert | NO (on resolution) | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Issues Urgent National Warning, Places US on High Alert | NO (on resolution) | LOW confidence**  
In a White House address, Trump delivered an emergency announcement on unspecified national security threats tied to Iran, prompting high alert status, Congressional reaction, and market movements; details remain vague.[3]

signals.headline: US Bishops Defend Just War Theory After Vance Warns Pope | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US Bishops Defend Just War Theory After Vance Warns Pope | YES | MED confidence**

signals.headline: Trump Hints Iran War Could End by April End if Deal Reached | YES (on potential ceasefire/deal) | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Hints Iran War Could End by April End if Deal Reached | YES (on potential ceasefire/deal) | MED confidence**  
US President Trump stated the war with Iran could conclude by late April via a deal with Tehran, amid a US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz launched April 13 and reports of ships still transiting despite it; he also suggested talks could resume within two days.[1]
